text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I go to a shrine with Nishino Flower, who's been
feeling down lately.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower bows at the torii gate before
heading through it, making sure to avoid the
middle of the path.
choice_data_list: You sure know your shrine etiquette.
You sure know your shrine etiquette.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe! After spotting other visitors doing the
same thing, I decided to look into it.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
We're here to request help from the gods, after
all. It's only natural to avoid offending them!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I'll go offer my prayers now.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
O gods, thank you for always watching over me. I
hope to continue receiving your blessings in the
future.

text_block_list.name: Little Girl
text_block_list.text: Wow, you sure bowed a bunch of times.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A young girl who was watching Nishino Flower
appears puzzled as she makes her observation.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I sure did. Before making a request to the gods,
you need to bow twice, clap twice, and then bow
one more time when you're done praying.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Here, why don't we try it together?

text_block_list.name: Little Girl
text_block_list.text: Sure!

text_block_list.name: Little Girl
text_block_list.text: (Bow, bow... clap, clap... and bow.)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: You got it, great job!

text_block_list.name: Little Girl
text_block_list.text: Ehehe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Suddenly, we hear a woman's voice call out to the
girl from afar.

text_block_list.name: Little Girl
text_block_list.text: Oh! Mommy's here! Bye-bye!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Bye-bye.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! She was so cute, wasn't she? That must be
what it feels like to have a little sister.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower is beaming and looks like she's
totally revitalized!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: First, you make an offering... Ahh!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I forgot to bring my coin purse... And I had 115
yen all ready to go... They say that amount brings
extra luck.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I quickly take out my wallet to see if I can help,
but unfortunately, I'm fresh out of coins.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Oh, please don't worry about it, Trainer. It's my
fault for being forgetful...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower's spirits are dampened, and her
condition fails to improve.
